contents:
[package]
edition = "2021"
authors = ["Drop-OSS"]
name = "droplet-rs"
version = "0.14.1"
license = "AGPL-3.0-only"
description = "Droplet is a `napi.rs` Rust/Node.js package full of high-performance and low-level utils for Drop"

[dependencies]
hex = "0.4.3"
time = "0.3.41"
ring = "0.17.14"
dyn-clone = "1.0.20"
anyhow = "1.0.100"
async-trait = "0.1.89"
serde_json = "1.0.145"
humansize = "2.1.3"
sha2 = "0.10.9"
futures = "0.3.31"
getrandom = "0.3.4"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "^1.48.0"
features = ["process", "fs", "io-util", "rt", "rt-multi-thread", "macros", "sync"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.228"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1.19.0"
features = ["v4"]

[dependencies.x509-parser]
version = "0.17.0"
features = ["verify"]

[dependencies.rcgen]
version = "0.13.2"
features = ["crypto", "pem", "x509-parser"]

[profile.release]
lto = true
strip = "symbols"

[package]
name = "native_model"
version = "0.6.4"
authors = ["Vincent Herlemont <vincent@herlemont.fr>", "quexeky <git@quexeky.dev>"]
edition = "2021"
description = "A thin wrapper around serialized data which add information of identity and version."
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/Drop-OSS/native_model"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["serialization", "interoperability", "data-consistency", "flexibility", "performance"]
categories = ["data-structures", "encoding", "rust-patterns"]
rust-version = "1.73.0"

[workspace]
members = ["native_model_macro"]

[dependencies]
thiserror = "2.0.0"
anyhow = "1.0.82"
doc-comment = "0.3.3"
log = "0.4.27"

[dependencies.zerocopy]
version = "0.8.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.native_model_macro]
version = "0.6.2"
path = "native_model_macro"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.200"
features = ["derive"]
optional = true

[dependencies.bincode_1_3]
package = "bincode"
version = "1.3.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.bincode_2]
package = "bincode"
version = "2.0"
features = ["serde"]
optional = true

[dependencies.postcard_1_0]
package = "postcard"
version = "1.0.8"
features = ["alloc"]
optional = true

[dependencies.rmp_serde_1_3]
package = "rmp-serde"
version = "1.3"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies]
serde_json = "1.0.116"

[dev-dependencies.criterion]
version = "0.7.0"

[features]
default = ["serde", "bincode_1_3"]

[[bench]]
name = "overhead"
harness = false

[package]
name = "native_model_macro"
version = "0.6.4"
authors = ["Vincent Herlemont <vincent@herlemont.fr>", "quexeky <git@quexeky.dev>"]
edition = "2018"
description = "A procedural macro for native_model"
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/Drop-OSS/native_model"
readme = "README.md"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
quote = "1.0.36"
proc-macro2 = "1.0.81"
log = "0.4.27"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2.0.60"
features = ["full"]

[source.vendored-sources]
directory = "cargo/vendor"

[source.crates-io]
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://github.com/drop-oss/droplet-rs"]
git = "https://github.com/drop-oss/droplet-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://github.com/drop-oss/native_model"]
git = "https://github.com/drop-oss/native_model"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
